orthodox_prayers.title: The Lord's Prayer
orthodox_prayers.text: Our Father, Who art in heaven, hallowed be Thy name. Thy kingdom come, Thy will be done, on earth as it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread, and forgive us our trespasses as we forgive those who trespass against us. And lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from evil. For Thine is the kingdom, and the power, and the glory, forever and ever. Amen.

orthodox_prayers.title: The Jesus Prayer
orthodox_prayers.text: Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, a sinner.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer to the Holy Spirit
orthodox_prayers.text: O Heavenly King, the Comforter, the Spirit of Truth, Who art everywhere and fillest all things, Treasury of Blessings and Giver of Life: Come and abide in us, and cleanse us of all impurity, and save our souls, O Good One.

orthodox_prayers.title: Trisagion Prayers
orthodox_prayers.text: Holy God, Holy Mighty, Holy Immortal, have mercy on us. (3 times)

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer to the Theotokos
orthodox_prayers.text: O Most Holy Theotokos, save us! More honorable than the Cherubim, and more glorious beyond compare than the Seraphim, without corruption thou gavest birth to God the Word: true Theotokos, we magnify thee.

orthodox_prayers.title: Morning Prayer
orthodox_prayers.text: Arising from sleep, we fall down before Thee, O Good One, and sing to Thee, O Mighty One, the angelic hymn: Holy, Holy, Holy art Thou, O God; through the Theotokos, have mercy on us.

orthodox_prayers.title: Evening Prayer
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord, keep us this evening without sin. Blessed art Thou, O Lord, the God of our fathers, and praised and glorified is Thy name unto the ages. Amen.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer Before Meals
orthodox_prayers.text: O Christ God, bless the food and drink of Thy servants, for holy art Thou, always, now and ever, and unto ages of ages. Amen.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer After Meals
orthodox_prayers.text: We thank Thee, O Christ our God, that Thou hast satisfied us with Thine earthly gifts; deprive us not of Thy Heavenly Kingdom, but as Thou camest among Thy disciples, O Savior, and gavest them peace, come to us and save us.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for the Dead
orthodox_prayers.text: With the Saints give rest, O Christ, to the souls of Thy servants, where there is neither sickness, nor sorrow, nor sighing, but life everlasting.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of St. Ephraim
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord and Master of my life, take from me the spirit of sloth, despair, lust of power, and idle talk. But give rather the spirit of chastity, humility, patience, and love to Thy servant. Yea, O Lord and King, grant me to see my own transgressions, and not to judge my brother, for blessed art Thou, unto ages of ages. Amen.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer Before Study
orthodox_prayers.text: Most blessed Lord, send the grace of Thy Holy Spirit on me to strengthen me that I may learn well the subject I am about to study and by it become a better person for Thy glory, the comfort of my family, and the benefit of Thy Church and our Nation.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer Before Travel
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord Jesus Christ our God, the true and living Way, be Thou, O Master, my companion, guide and guardian during my journey; deliver and protect me from all danger, misfortune and temptation.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for the Sick
orthodox_prayers.text: O Holy Father, heavenly Physician of our souls and bodies, who sent Thine Only-begotten Son our Lord Jesus Christ to heal all our ailments and deliver us from death: visit and heal Thy servant (name), granting him/her release from pain and restoration to health and vigor.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of St. John Chrysostom
orthodox_prayers.text: Lord Jesus Christ my God, loose, remit, forgive my sins, whether in knowledge or in ignorance, whether in word or in deed, whether in thought or in feeling, whether by day or by night; forgive me everything, for Thou art good and lovest mankind.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer to Guardian Angel
orthodox_prayers.text: O Holy Angel, standing by my wretched soul and my passionate life, forsake not me a sinner, nor depart from me because of my intemperance. Give no place to the evil demon to subdue me through the oppression of this mortal body.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer Before Confession
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord God of my salvation, the Savior and Benefactor of my soul, I am truly sorry for my every transgression and I firmly resolve to amend my life from this day. Receive my confession and accept these tears of contrition.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer Before Communion
orthodox_prayers.text: I believe, O Lord, and I confess that Thou art truly the Christ, the Son of the Living God, who camest into the world to save sinners, of whom I am first.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer After Communion
orthodox_prayers.text: I thank Thee, O Lord my God, that Thou hast not rejected me, a sinner, but hast granted me to be a communicant of Thy holy mysteries.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Peace
orthodox_prayers.text: O God of peace, lover of concord, who hast commanded us to love our enemies and to do good to them that hate us: grant peace and love to all the world.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of Protection
orthodox_prayers.text: Under Thy mercy we take refuge, O Theotokos. Do not reject our supplications in our necessity, but deliver us from danger, O only pure and blessed one.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for the Church
orthodox_prayers.text: Remember, O Lord, Thy Holy, Catholic, and Apostolic Church; confirm and strengthen it, increase it and keep it in peace, and preserve it unconquerable forever.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Enemies
orthodox_prayers.text: Lord Jesus Christ, who didst command us to love our enemies, and those who defame and injure us, and to pray for them and forgive them; Who Thyself didst pray for Thine enemies, who crucified thee: grant us, we pray, the spirit of Christian reconciliation and meekness.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of St. Basil the Great
orthodox_prayers.text: O God and Lord of the Powers, and Maker of all creation, who through the tender-hearted compassion of Thine incomparable mercy didst send Thine Only-Begotten Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, for the salvation of our race.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for the Living
orthodox_prayers.text: Remember, O Lord, all those who have asked us, the unworthy, to pray for them. Remember all our brethren on earth and on the sea, in the air, in every place of Thy dominion who are in need of Thy loving-kindness and help.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of St. Gregory Palamas
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord, enlighten my darkness. O Lord, illumine me with the light of Thy countenance. Let Thy mercy, O Lord, be upon me. O Lord, teach me Thy statutes.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for the Home
orthodox_prayers.text: Visit, O Lord, this home and drive far from it all snares of the enemy. Let Thy holy angels dwell herein to preserve us in peace, and let Thy blessing be upon us forever.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Work
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord Jesus Christ, who art the only-begotten Son of the eternal Father, Thou hast said with Thy most holy lips: Without Me you can do nothing. O Lord, I embrace in faith Thy words with my heart and soul.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Children
orthodox_prayers.text: O Heavenly Father, who loves children, bless our children with Thy presence. Fill them with Thy light, surround them with Thy glory, and preserve them by Thy grace.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Marriage
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord Jesus Christ, by Thy presence at the wedding in Cana of Galilee, Thou didst show that marriage is blessed. We beseech Thee, grant that our marriage may be holy and filled with Thy presence.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of St. Nicholas
orthodox_prayers.text: O Holy Father Nicholas, the fruit of thy good deeds hath enlightened and delighted the hearts of the faithful. Who can tell of thy mighty deeds and numberless miracles?

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Patience
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord, grant me to greet the coming day in peace. Help me in all things to rely upon Thy holy will. In every hour of the day reveal Thy will to me.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Humility
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord and Master of my life, take from me the spirit of pride, vainglory and conceit, and grant unto me, Thy servant, the spirit of humility.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for the Departed
orthodox_prayers.text: Remember, O Lord, the souls of Thy departed servants, and all Orthodox Christians who have fallen asleep in the hope of resurrection unto life eternal.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer Before Icons
orthodox_prayers.text: We reverence Thy spotless icon, O gracious Lord, and ask forgiveness of our transgressions, O Christ our God.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Wisdom
orthodox_prayers.text: O All-wise Lord, grant me wisdom to recognize what I should do, courage to undertake it, and strength to accomplish it.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Protection at Night
orthodox_prayers.text: Into Thy hands, O Lord, I commend my spirit. Protect me under the shadow of Thy wings, preserve me from all evil, and save me by Thy grace.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of St. John of Damascus
orthodox_prayers.text: O Master, Lord Jesus Christ our God, who alone hast power to forgive sins: forgive all the sins that I have committed in knowledge or in ignorance.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Family Unity
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord, bind us together with ties of love, unity and peace. Grant that we may be of one heart and one soul, as Thou art one with the Father.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Priests
orthodox_prayers.text: Remember, O Lord, all Orthodox bishops and priests, especially those who rightly teach the word of Thy truth. Strengthen them in their holy ministry.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Love
orthodox_prayers.text: O God of love, teach me to love my neighbors as myself, to forgive as I have been forgiven, and to show mercy as I have received mercy.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer Before Reading Scripture
orthodox_prayers.text: Illumine our hearts, O Master who lovest mankind, with the pure light of Thy divine knowledge, and open the eyes of our mind to understand the teachings of Thy Gospel.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for the Nation
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord, save our nation and bless our land. Grant peace, prosperity and godliness to all our people, and preserve us from all harm and danger.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer of St. Symeon
orthodox_prayers.text: Lord, now lettest Thou Thy servant depart in peace, according to Thy word; for mine eyes have seen Thy salvation.

orthodox_prayers.title: Prayer for Strength
orthodox_prayers.text: O Lord, grant me strength to bear the burdens of this day with patience. Help me to overcome all difficulties through Thy grace.
